description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu opened 11 pull requests in qiuethan/Misty, numbered #107 through #117. He logged 28 hrs 33 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 47 mins. His WakaTime activity was mostly in Python, Markdown, and TypeScript, across 4 projects.
